task_completion.description: Move the log aggregation issue to Q1 2025 Goals and change priority to High
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the issue 'Implement centralized log aggregation with OpenSearch' in the Redmine interface. Verify that its 'Target version' (or Milestone) is set to 'Q1 2025 Goals' and its 'Priority' is set to 'High'.

task_completion.description: Change the Kubernetes issue priority to Immediate
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the issue 'Set up Kubernetes cluster for production workloads'. Verify that its 'Priority' field is set to 'Immediate'.

task_completion.description: Add the required reprioritization comment to the Kubernetes issue
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the history or notes section of the 'Set up Kubernetes cluster for production workloads' issue. Verify there is a comment containing: 'REPRIORITIZED: K8s setup is now the critical path for Mobile App v2.0 Release deployment and log aggregation rollout. All blockers must be cleared this sprint.'

task_completion.description: Create a new Support issue with correct metadata and assignee
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a newly created issue with the subject 'Q1 2025 sprint scope change notification'. Verify that its Tracker is 'Support', Status is 'New', Priority is 'Low', and Assignee is 'Alice Chen'.

task_completion.description: Include the correct description in the new Support issue
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the description of the newly created 'Q1 2025 sprint scope change notification' issue. Verify it contains the text: 'Log aggregation pulled forward to Q1 2025. Kubernetes priority raised to Immediate. Q1 scope now requires capacity review — please confirm team availability with engineering leads before sprint start.'

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser (like Chromium/Firefox) navigating the Redmine web interface, rather than terminal windows executing curl commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine Redmine application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should display the standard Redmine UI elements (menus, issue lists, edit forms, success flash messages) rather than a text editor or mock HTML file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use database commands to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should not show terminal windows running SQL commands (like sqlite3 or psql) or ruby console commands to directly modify the Redmine database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target project is 'Infrastructure & DevOps' (identifier: infra-devops). The log aggregation issue subject contains 'centralized log aggregation', its expected milestone is 'Q1 2025 Goals', and expected priority is 'High'. The Kubernetes issue subject contains 'Kubernetes cluster for production' and its expected priority is 'Immediate'. The new scope change issue must be assigned to 'Alice Chen'.
